customAttributes.description:
Secret Lair x Ghost of Tsushima

Exile two target artifacts, creatures, and/or lands you control, then return those cards to the battlefield under your control.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in Secret Lair x Ghost of Tsushima and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/13/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
